media.title: Pacers waive Taelon Peter, narrow two-way contract competition to four
media.description: The Pacers waived two-way contract guard Taelon Peter on Monday. Braden Smith, Ethan Thompson, Jalen Slawson and Kobe Brown remain in mix for 3 spots

items.title: Pacers announced the signings of Kobe Brown (two-way) and Larry Nance Jr earlier. Micah Potter has officially been waived. Pacers with 17 under contract + Braden Smith (draft rights) and Jalen Slawson (qualifying offer) in their orbit right now.

items.title: Pacers officially announce signing of Larry Nance Jr. to a standard contract, Kobe Brown to a two-way deal.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers officially announce signing of Larry Nance Jr. to a standard contract, Kobe Brown to a two-way deal.

They have Brown, Taelon Peter, and Ethan Thompson on their three two-way deals. With rookie Braden Smith expected to secure one.

We may see it play out at Summer League
